results.title: RRB Group D Result 2026 OUT On Direct Link @rrbcdg.gov.in For Bhubaneswar And Prayagraj; Download Merit List PDF Here
results.description: RRB Group D Result 2026 has been released for the Prayagraj and Bhubaneswar regions. Candidates can download the merit list PDF, check their qualifying status and find out when the scorecard will be available. The post RRB Group D Result 2026 OUT On Direct Link @rrbcdg.gov.in For Bhubaneswar And Prayagraj; Download Merit List PDF Here appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .

results.title: S.K. Sinha Takes Charge as Director (Finance) of GAIL India
results.description: S.K. Sinha has assumed charge as Director (Finance) of GAIL (India) Limited after serving as Executive Director (Finance & Accounts).

results.title: JAPANESE AUTOMAKER HONDA AND NISSAN ELECTRONIC CONTROL UNITS HONDA AND NISSAN NEW PARTNERSHIP MANUFACTURING FACILITIES IN INDIA
results.description: Honda and Nissan Partnership: ಜಪಾನಿನ ವಾಹನ ತಯಾರಕರಾದ ಹೋಂಡಾ ಮತ್ತು ನಿಸ್ಸಾನ್ ಶೀಘ್ರದಲ್ಲೇ ಎಲೆಕ್ಟ್ರಿಕ್​ ವಾಹನಗಳಿಗಾಗಿ ಹೊಸ ಪಾಲುದಾರಿಕೆ ಘೋಷಿಸಲಿವೆ. ಈ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಇಲ್ಲಿದೆ ಫುಲ್​ ಡಿಟೇಲ್ಸ್​.

results.title: Afghanistan-Pakistan Tensions Escalate As Taliban Claims Cross-Border Airstrikes On ISIS Bases
results.description: A senior Taliban military commander described the operation as a "precision" campaign aimed at dismantling militant infrastructure allegedly operating across the Durand Line.

results.title: Canada: Poilievre reshuffles shadow ministers, elevates 3 Indian-origin MPs
results.description: Canada's Conservative leader Pierre Poilievre reshuffles top critics, promoting three Indo-Canadian MPs, aiming to address affordability issues.

results.title: Ayushmann Khurrana Teams Up With Yash Raj Films For Mupapa
results.description: Ayushmann Khurrana's Mupapa will release in theatres on February 19, 2027, marking the first theatrical collaboration between Yash Raj Films and Posham Pa Pictures.
